В этом документе анализируются по отдельности две линии BTN2.1 и BTN2.2

Частота зараженных мидий невелика: единицы процентов в поселении

Частота BTN варьирует вдоль побережья

Размерная структура и обилие мидий

Связь зараженности со средовыми предикторами

Проверка валидности модели

## $uniformity
## 
##  Exact one-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test
## 
## data:  simulationOutput$scaledResiduals
## D = 0.13624, p-value = 0.1257
## alternative hypothesis: two-sided
## 
## 
## $dispersion
## 
##  DHARMa nonparametric dispersion test via sd of residuals fitted vs.
##  simulated
## 
## data:  simulationOutput
## dispersion = 1.0167, p-value = 0.8312
## alternative hypothesis: two.sided
## 
## 
## $outliers
## 
##  DHARMa bootstrapped outlier test
## 
## data:  simulationOutput
## outliers at both margin(s) = 0, observations = 72, p-value = 1
## alternative hypothesis: two.sided
##  percent confidence interval:
##  0 0
## sample estimates:
## outlier frequency (expected: 0.000138888888888889 ) 
##                                                   0
## 
##  DHARMa nonparametric dispersion test via sd of residuals fitted vs.
##  simulated
## 
## data:  simulationOutput
## dispersion = 1.0167, p-value = 0.8312
## alternative hypothesis: two.sided
## 
## Method: REML   Optimizer: outer newton
## full convergence after 12 iterations.
## Gradient range [-9.353987e-06,1.463887e-05]
## (score 110.5158 & scale 1).
## Hessian positive definite, eigenvalue range [4.655482e-06,2.33046].
## Model rank =  87 / 87 
## 
## Basis dimension (k) checking results. Low p-value (k-index<1) may
## indicate that k is too low, especially if edf is close to k'.
## 
##                                  k'      edf k-index p-value
## s(Dist_Port):LineageBTN1   4.00e+00 1.00e+00    0.95    0.61
## s(Dist_Port):LineageBTN2.1 4.00e+00 1.52e-05    0.95    0.63
## s(Dist_Port):LineageBTN2.2 4.00e+00 4.33e-01    0.95    0.60
## s(fetch):LineageBTN1       4.00e+00 9.92e-01    0.89    0.34
## s(fetch):LineageBTN2.1     4.00e+00 1.46e-04    0.89    0.42
## s(fetch):LineageBTN2.2     4.00e+00 3.91e-05    0.89    0.38
## s(PC1):LineageBTN1         4.00e+00 1.95e+00    1.01    0.80
## s(PC1):LineageBTN2.1       4.00e+00 2.23e-05    1.01    0.85
## s(PC1):LineageBTN2.2       4.00e+00 1.76e-05    1.01    0.78
## s(OGP):LineageBTN1         4.00e+00 6.82e-01    0.94    0.56

Результат построения модели

## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## cbind(N_cancer, N_helthy) ~ s((Dist_Port), by = Lineage, bs = "cs", 
##     k = 5) + s((fetch), by = Lineage, bs = "cs", k = 5) + s((PC1),
